title: Kawa's Flora
description: Flowers galore, add to your mc world for aesthetics.
body:
**Kawa's flora** is a mod i made to add flowers i like, initially. (Though you can always suggest more flower species, on this mod's [github!](https://github.com/fadingRemembrancer/kawaflora) !)

Currently this mod adds the following flowers to the world:
- Chrysanthemum (3 Variants)
- Cockscomb (5 Variants)  
- Forget-Me-Not
- Cape Leadwort
- False Shamrock
- Bird-Of-Paradise
- Classic Rose  
- Cyan Rose

As far as I'm aware, there shouldn't be any world gen issues? At most the new flowers won't be in biomes added by mods.
 
With more coming soon. ( ´ ∀ `)
